title: Fogmog
move_pattern: Starts with Illusory Spores (summons an EyeWithTeeth), then Thwack. After each Thwack, randomly either uses Thwack again (40%, then forced into Headbutt) or goes directly to Headbutt (60%). Headbutt always leads back to Thwack, repeating the cycle.
notes: Illusory Spores summons an EyeWithTeeth monster into combat on the first turn. Each use of Thwack (both SWIPE_MOVE and SWIPE_RANDOM_MOVE) also grants the Fogmog 1 Strength, so its attack damage increases over the course of the fight. The random branch after Thwack uses CannotRepeat, preventing consecutive use of the same branch.
